# Copilot Instructions

This workspace contains an ASP.NET Core MVC real estate website.

## Project Rules

- Keep changes within the existing MVC structure in the root project.
- Use Bootstrap 5 for layout and responsive styling.
- Keep page text driven by backend data through `StaticData` and the localization helpers.
- Preserve the current namespace `WebSite` unless a rename is explicitly requested.
- Prefer small, focused edits that keep the project compiling cleanly.
- Use EF Core and the existing SQLite database setup in `RealEstateDbContext` and `DbInitializer`.
- Follow the existing naming style for view models and properties when extending the project.
